title: Massaman Glazed Chinese Curry Paste Dan Dan Mian
description:
Citrusy and glassy, this Ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly Dan Dan Mian dish features Massaman curry paste.

This dish is perfect for meal prep and can be stored in a salt block for later use.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and ginger and saut	8 until fragrant.
Add Chinese broccoli and cook until tender.
Add Massaman curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add rice noodles and cook according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, combine water, palm sugar, and fish sauce. Bring to a boil and then reduce heat to a simmer.
Add Massaman curry paste mixture to the simmering water and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the Massaman curry paste mixture and toss to coat.
Transfer the noodles to a salt block and let rest for at least 30 minutes before serving.
